name: Baked Catfish a La Meuniere
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Arrange catfish fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
3. Beat the egg in a shallow dish, then mix in grated Parmesan cheese and cracker meal until well combined.
4. Season each fillet with lemon and herb seasoning, coating both sides evenly.
5. Dip each fillet into the egg mixture, ensuring it is fully coated on all sides.
6. Place the seasoned catfish fillets onto the prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Turn off the oven and let the catfish rest for a few minutes before serving.
